channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: US sanctions on rogue VPN accidentally break Telegram's short links worldwide
item.description: Telegram’s t.me domain was swept up in a global outage following US Treasury sanctions against First VPN services, causing millions of web links to break worldwide.

item.title: Ex-MBDA engineer builds $1,100, 40g AI micro-drone using AMD phased-array sonar for YC-backed startup Tornyol to eradicate mosquitoes, currently restricted to 3-minute flights
item.description: Former MBDA engineer Alex Toussaint creates an AI mosquito-hunting drone using sonar, though battery limits restrict current operations.

item.title: No product? No problem. This Disrupt 2026 session shows how to get pre-seed funding with conviction, storytelling
item.description: It’s not just you: AI startups are taking in a huge amount of seed funding, and in the process making things harder for anyone looking for funding even at a pre-seed stage. We’ve covered the trend in detail, and at this year’s TechCrunch Disrupt event, we want to help pre-seed founders now being held to seed-stage […]

item.title: Europe’s tech reset gives the UK a chance to lead on security and sovereignty
item.description: The UK has a profound opportunity to become a trusted partner for secure, resilient digital infrastructure.

item.title: iPhone 18 Pro Max : l’appareil photo fuite, avec une très bonne nouvelle et une autre décevante
item.description: Un document issu du piratage de Tata Electronics révèle ce que proposeront les capteurs photo de l'iPhone 18 Pro Max. Il y a bien une nouveauté, mais c'est en majorité du réchauffé.

item.title: Elegoo's emoji-branded Centauri Carbon 2 3D printer gets a price cut for World Emoji Day (yes, really) — and we called it one of the most reliable multifilament machines on the market
item.description: Save on one of the cheapest and most reliable 3D printers that's ever been through our workshop.

item.title: After ceasefire collapse, U.S. expands attacks on Iranian infrastructure to gain control of the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: U.S. airstrikes hit bridges and energy sites. The United States expanded its airstrike campaign against Iran early Friday by hitting more bridges, energy sites and collapsing a tower at a key Iranian port, part of U.S. President Donald Trump’s threats to start striking infrastructure to pressure Tehran to ease its chokehold on the Strait of Hormuz.Iran launched new missile attacks against U.S.-allied nations in the Middle East, including Qatar, a key mediator in the war. It also damaged a power and water desalination plant in Kuwait — something crucial in the small, desert nation.The interim ...

item.title: XPeng s’associe à Google Maps pour la navigation et l’aide à la conduite en Europe : ce que ça va réellement changer
item.description: XPeng officialise un partenariat avec Google Maps pour équiper la navigation et l'aide à la conduite de ses véhicules vendus hors de Chine. L'accord, dévoilé à la veille du lancement de la L03, doit aussi servir de socle à l'arrivée en Europe du système de conduite assistée NGP, annoncée pour début 2027.

item.title: Zoox issues software recall after a robotaxi got confused by heavy smoke
item.description: The recall comes as the top automotive safety regulator in the U.S. has warned AV companies about their vehicles interfering with first responders.

item.title: Surfshark’s FastTrack now covers more than 2.000 servers — your city might be on the list too
item.description: Surfshark extends its FastTrack technology to thousands of servers across all continents and now covers more than half of its entire network. Here’s why it matters

item.title: Claude can now enter all your passwords for you - if you give it permission
item.description: 1Password partnership will mean Claude will never see the secrets or load them into its own memory.

item.title: En raison des champs magnétiques de la Voie lactée, les étoiles ne devraient pas s'y former... mais alors ?
item.description: Les premiers rudiments de la théorie de la formation des étoiles remontent à ceux de la théorie de la formation du Système solaire, il y a plus de 200 ans, dans les écrits de Kant et Laplace. Mais, au XXe siècle, les astrophysiciens ont découvert des barrières à la formation des étoiles selon...

item.title: Netflix has admitted to using AI on '300 movies and shows' in 2026 — and I've never been more disappointed
item.description: Netflix has shockingly announced that many of their projects have used AI in 2026.

item.title: Over half a million power tool batteries have been recalled due to a USB-C charging fire risk
item.description: Greenworks Tools has issued a recall for around 554,780 Kobalt-branded power tools designed for yard work because of a battery issue "posing a risk of serious injury from fire hazard." There have been 34 reports of the tool's batteries "producing smoke, sparking or catching fire while the batteries are inserted in the tool and charging […]

item.title: Netflix admet avoir utilisé l’IA pour modifier 300 films et séries
item.description: Netflix a annoncé avoir utilisé l'intelligence artificielle pour modifier 300 films et séries en postproduction. La plateforme de streaming assure que certaines scènes n’auraient jamais vu le jour autrement.

item.title: Bethesda teases Fallout 5 soon after Xbox’s mass layoffs
item.description: Xbox is currently in a "reset" period that includes laying off around 3,200 employees over the next year, involving deep cuts at beloved studios like id Software and Obsidian Entertainment. Now, in an attempt to show that things are still running fine, the company has announced a slate of upcoming projects at Bethesda Game Studios […]

item.title: The manosphere’s testosterone fever is coming for the troops
item.description: This is Optimizer, a weekly newsletter sent from Verge senior reviewer Victoria Song that dissects and discusses the latest gizmos and potions that swear they're going to change your life. Opt in for Optimizer here. I was in the middle of writing a different Optimizer column this week when I learned that Pete Hegseth is […]

item.title: 7 new movies and TV shows to watch on Netflix, Prime Video, Disney+, and more this weekend (July 17)
item.description: From Obsession's official streaming debut to the long-awaited Heartstopper finale, here's what's worth watching at home this weekend.

item.title: Engadget Podcast: Is Siri AI actually useful in iOS 27 and macOS Golden Gate?
item.description: Also, we try to make sense of OpenAI's rumored AI smart speaker.

item.title: 'This is the right call' — VPN industry praises the UK’s decisions to leave VPN alone
item.description: UK officials have confirmed that VPN restrictions are off the cards. Data proves that only a minority of kids use them to bypass age checks, with privacy being the most popular use. The VPN industry now urges the EU to follow suit.

item.title: Is sovereignty threatening your resilience?
item.description: Sovereignty has entered a hype-cycle, and organizations risk missing the bigger operational picture.

item.title: Two 32GB DDR5-6000 RAM kits just dropped in price — choose V-Color's low-latency Manta XSky or Corsair's Vengeance
item.description: Take your pick between CL30 and CL36.

item.title: Conspiracy Theorists Think Trump’s Speech Paves the Path to the Insurrection Act
item.description: Election deniers have spent years promoting the idea that the 2020 election was stolen. They believe Donald Trump’s speech finally proves them right.

item.title: God of War show recasts Kratos after Ryan Hurst sustains an injury on set
item.description: The Prime Video series will reshoot episodes with a new lead actor.

item.title: Cette manette premium de chez Razer pour PC/PS5 coûte trois fois moins cher à la fin des soldes
item.description: La Razer Wolverine V2 Pro est une manette sans fil haut de gamme pensée pour le jeu compétitif avec une excellente réactivité que vous retrouvez pour 97,06 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Verizon layoffs today: More jobs slashed as wireless giant moves to sell retail stores to franchisees
item.description: The news comes several months after Verizon laid off 13,000 workers at the end of last year, signaling major strategy shifts for CEO Dan Schulman. Verizon Communications, the largest U.S. wireless carrier by subscriber count, is reportedly planning to cut about 3,000 jobs. Most of the job cuts are tied to a significant shift in the company’s retail store operations. ...

item.title: Even Microsoft couldn’t make Windows 11 work well on 8GB of RAM
item.description: Last year, Microsoft's 13-inch Surface Laptop quickly became one of my favorite thin-and-light Windows notebooks. At $900, it was easy to recommend to anyone wanting MacBook Air-like build quality and battery life on Windows - I even convinced my sister to buy one on sale. But that was last year. This year, thanks to RAMageddon, […]

item.title: Most smart appliances collect data: Here's how to find out what yours tracks
item.description: There's truth to the idea that our devices are spying on us. Smart fridges, washing machines and dishwashers are no exception.

item.title: 7-Eleven and Hot Wheels just dropped an exclusive Nissan GT-R collectible — heres how to get it
item.description: 7-Eleven and Hot Wheels have teamed up again for an exclusive 2017 Nissan GT-R die-cast collectible. Here's where to find it before it sells out.

item.title: Tatiana Maslany breaks down Maximum Pleasure Guaranteeds courtroom finale
item.description: Tatiana Maslany dives deep into the cathartic finale of "Maximum Pleasure Guaranteed," as well as the challenges of playing Paula Sanders.

item.title: Meilleur clavier pour iPad (Air, Pro, iPad 11) : notre sélection 2026
item.description: Vous cherchez un bon clavier physique pour accompagner votre iPad ? Voici tout de suite quels sont les meilleurs modèles de claviers pour les différents iPad de chez Apple.

item.title: The Chat Control gambit: The EU's 'undemocratic' revival of chat scanning may have long term consequences for digital privacy
item.description: Temporary CSAM chat scanning got the green light in Europe, three months after Parliament voted it down. Opponents now warn it could pave the way for lasting legislation that's unfit to protect our privacy.

item.title: Coca-Cola shuts down Fairlife dairy production lines following ransomware attack
item.description: Coca-Cola confirms ransomware attack on Fairlife in an 8-K form filed with the SEC.

item.title: EU defangs a key pillar of its climate policy to allow more pollution
item.description: Europe's latest updates to its climate policy aren't great news for the planet.

item.title: À moins de 6 années-lumière, ces exoplanètes ont peut-être l'élément essentiel pour la vie
item.description: Notre but principal en explorant le monde des exoplanètes est de découvrir à quel point la Terre et sa biosphère sont une rareté ou non. Les exoplanètes les plus proches sont les plus faciles à étudier dans ce but. Or, il existe un système de planètes rocheuses autour de l'étoile de Barnard à un...

item.title: Netflix stock is getting battered again. Now it says it will share viewership metrics even less frequently
item.description: With shares already down 41% over the last 12 months, Netflix said it will reduce the frequency of its watch reports because ‘all hours are not created equal.’ Shares of Netflix Inc (Nasdaq: NFLX) are down more than 11% in premarket trading on Friday following an earnings report that came close to Wall Street’s expectations but also announced plans to reduce engagement transparency. ...

item.title: Est-ce illégal d’utiliser un VPN pour contourner un blocage géographique ? La justice européenne répond
item.description: La CJUE estime qu’un fournisseur VPN ne peut pas être tenu responsable du contournement d’un blocage géographique réalisé par un utilisateur pour accéder à des œuvres protégées. L’affaire porte sur la mise en ligne des manuscrits du Journal d’Anne Frank, libres de droits en Belgique mais encore protégés aux Pays-Bas.

item.title: What is the release date for House of the Dragon season 3 episode 5 on HBO Max?
item.description: House of the Dragon season 3 enters its back half with this week's chapter — here's when you can watch it.

item.title: The biggest barrier to AI success isn't AI
item.description: How data infrastructure is holding AI projects back

item.title: Trump is selling high-speed access to his market-moving Truth Social posts
item.description: Trump Media, the company behind Truth Social, is selling Wall Street faster access to the "most market-moving" posts on the US President's social media platform. On Thursday, Trump Media announced plans to launch "Truth API," a licensed real time data feed for businesses that provides "the fastest access to Truth Social's most influential accounts." It […]...
